scripts.validate: if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo 'SKIP: fga model validation runs via GitHub Action in CI'; exit 0; fi && fga model validate --file authorization-model.fga
scripts.test: if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo 'SKIP: fga model tests run via GitHub Action in CI'; exit 0; fi && fga model test --tests 'tests/*.fga.yaml'
